title: Plain-language (grade 6-8) + WCAG 2.2 AA + health-system-neutrality sweep across the set
context: A cross-cutting plain-language, accessibility, and health-system-neutrality sweep over the full ewing-survivorship-late-effects content set. It enforces grade 6-8 readability and WCAG 2.2 AA and confirms schedules that differ by guideline/country are framed neutrally and cited. It does not alter clinical substance and does not bypass the dual-review gate; any substantive change re-enters review.
objective: Sweep the full content set for grade 6-8 readability, WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility, and health-system-neutral framing, with advocate confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: Every entry meets the grade 6-8 readability target (measured) with advocate confirmation
Health-system-neutrality framing applied across the set (schedules differ by guideline/country, each cited); no substantive clinical change made without re-entering dual review
output: PR: plain-language + WCAG 2.2 AA + health-system-neutrality sweep across output/entries/
